пїњ# Copilot Instructions вАУ SemaDoc Data Catalog

## Project Overview

Standalone, static documentation portal for Power BI Semantic Models generated by [SemaDoc](https://semadoc.io). Deliverable to customers as a self-contained package.

The portal contains two pages:
1. **SemaDoc Data Catalog** (`/en/docs-example`) вАФ searchable catalog of all documented Semantic Models
2. **SemaDoc Standalone Viewer** (`/en/viewer`) вАФ client-side Markdown viewer (file upload, no server required)

## Tech Stack

- **Framework**: [Astro](https://astro.build/) (static site generator)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS 3.x via `@astrojs/tailwind`
- **Language**: TypeScript (strict mode)
- **Output**: Static HTML (`astro build` вЖТ `dist/`)
- **Hosting**: Any static host (webspace FTP, S3, Azure Static Web Apps, вА¶)

## Project Structure

```
вФЬвФАвФА astro.config.mjs          # Astro config (tailwind, sitemap)
вФЬвФАвФА tailwind.config.mjs       # Tailwind theme (colors, fonts)
вФЬвФАвФА tsconfig.json             # TypeScript config
вФЬвФАвФА public/
вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА .htaccess             # Clean URLs, .md access block, AI opt-out header
вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА robots.txt            # SEO
вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА fonts/                # Inter font files (self-hosted)
вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА logos/                # SemaDoc logo files
вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА images/               # Images
вФВ   вФФвФАвФА scripts/
вФВ       вФФвФАвФА semadoc-handlers.js  # Client-side: Mermaid, Highlight.js, Dark Mode, Export
вФЬвФАвФА src/
вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА config.ts             # Feature flags (viewer: true)
вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА components/
вФВ   вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА Button.astro      # CTA button (primary/secondary variants)
вФВ   вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА Footer.astro      # Minimal copyright footer
вФВ   вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА Header.astro      # Sticky header with 2-item navigation
вФВ   вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА ModelDocPage.astro   # Tabbed model detail view
вФВ   вФВ   вФФвФАвФА ViewerPage.astro     # Client-side Markdown viewer
вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА i18n/
вФВ   вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА en.json           # English UI strings
вФВ   вФВ   вФФвФАвФА index.ts          # i18n helpers: t(), getLocalizedPath(), getLocaleFromUrl()
вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА layouts/
вФВ   вФВ   вФФвФАвФА BaseLayout.astro  # Base HTML layout (head, meta, header, footer)
вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА data/
вФВ   вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА markdown/         # Semantic Model documentation (one subfolder per model)
вФВ   вФВ   вФФвФАвФА help/             # Help documentation (English)
вФВ   вФВ       вФЬвФАвФА doc_help_en.md
вФВ   вФВ       вФФвФАвФА doc_help_detail_en.md
вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА pages/
вФВ   вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА index.astro                          # Redirect вЖТ /en/docs-example
вФВ   вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА search-index.json.ts                 # Static search index (build-time)
вФВ   вФВ   вФФвФАвФА en/
вФВ   вФВ       вФЬвФАвФА docs-example.astro               # Data Catalog overview
вФВ   вФВ       вФЬвФАвФА docs-example/
вФВ   вФВ       вФВ   вФФвФАвФА [workspace]/
вФВ   вФВ       вФВ       вФФвФАвФА [model].astro            # Model detail page (dynamic route)
вФВ   вФВ       вФФвФАвФА viewer.astro                     # Standalone Viewer
вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА styles/
вФВ   вФВ   вФФвФАвФА prose-content.css # Table & prose styles
вФВ   вФФвФАвФА utils/
вФВ       вФЬвФАвФА markdown.ts       # Markdown rendering utilities (build-time)
вФВ       вФФвФАвФА slug.ts           # URL slug helpers
вФФвФАвФА scripts/
    вФФвФАвФА sanitize_markdown.py  # Utility: sanitize Markdown files before adding to catalog
```

## Data Source

Markdown documentation files live in `src/data/markdown/`. Each subfolder represents one Semantic Model вАФ the subfolder name is the model's display name (used in the catalog sidebar and page title).

```
src/data/markdown/
вФЬвФАвФА Adventure Works DW 2020/
вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА model_documentation.md
вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА table_documentation.md
вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА measure_documentation.md
вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА import_logic_documentation.md
вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА calculation_item_documentation.md
вФВ   вФЬвФАвФА udf_documentation.md
вФВ   вФФвФАвФА security_documentation.md
вФФвФАвФА (further models вА¶)
```

## i18n Architecture

- **Locale**: English only (`en`)
- **Routing**: Prefix-based (`/en/вА¶`), root `/` redirects to `/en/docs-example`
- **UI strings**: `src/i18n/en.json`, accessed via `t(locale)` helper
- **`Locale` type**: Fixed as `'en'` in `src/i18n/index.ts`

## Design System

### Colors (Tailwind custom theme)
- **Primary** (Dark blue): `primary-700: #1a365d` (main brand), `primary-600`, `primary-50`
- **Accent** (Blue): `accent-400` to `accent-600` for highlights
- **Neutral**: `neutral-50` to `neutral-900` for text, backgrounds, borders

### Typography
- Font: Inter (self-hosted via `public/fonts/`)
- Headings: `font-bold text-primary-700`
- Body: `text-neutral-600` / `text-neutral-800`

### Layout Patterns
- Max width: `max-w-6xl` (content)
- Responsive: Mobile-first, `md:` breakpoint for desktop layouts

## Conventions

### Adding a new Semantic Model
1. Create a subfolder under `src/data/markdown/` with the model's display name
2. Add the standard Markdown files (at minimum `model_documentation.md`)
3. Run `npm run build` вАФ the model appears automatically in the catalog, detail page, and search index

### Adding a new component
1. Create in `src/components/` as an `.astro` file
2. Define props via TypeScript interface in the frontmatter
3. Use Tailwind utility classes for styling (no separate CSS files)

### Editing UI labels
Edit `src/i18n/en.json`. Active keys: `nav`, `catalog`, `doc_tabs`, `doc_labels`, `viewer`, `footer`.

## Commands

```bash
npm run dev      # Start dev server (http://localhost:4321)
npm run build    # Build static site вЖТ dist/
npm run preview  # Preview built site locally
```

## Deployment

Upload the `dist/` folder to any static webspace. The `.htaccess` in `public/` handles clean URLs and blocks direct `.md` file access.

### Adding a new Semantic Model
1. Create a subfolder under `src/data/markdown/` with the model's display name
2. Add the standard Markdown files (at minimum `model_documentation.md`)
3. Run `npm run build` вАФ the model appears automatically in the catalog, detail page, and search index

### Adding a new component
1. Create in `src/components/` as an `.astro` file
2. Define props via TypeScript interface in the frontmatter
3. Use Tailwind utility classes for styling (no separate CSS files)

### Editing UI labels
Edit `src/i18n/en.json`. Active keys: `nav`, `catalog`, `doc_tabs`, `doc_labels`, `viewer`, `footer`.

```bash
npm run dev      # Start dev server (http://localhost:4321)
npm run build    # Build static site вЖТ dist/
```

Upload the `dist/` folder to any static webspace. The `.htaccess` in `public/` handles clean URLs and blocks direct `.md` file access.
